extension.description: Intelligent document converter that transforms Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and PDF files to Markdown with built-in conversion engine
config.title: DocuGenius
config.autoConvert.description: Enable automatic conversion of supported files to Markdown
config.overwriteExisting.description: Overwrite existing .md files if source file is newer
config.extractImages.description: [BETA] Extract images from Word, Excel, and PowerPoint documents to a separate assets folder (PDF image extraction is not supported)
config.imageOutputFolder.description: Folder name for extracted images, used for saved assets and Markdown links (relative to the document location or markdown subdirectory; only effective when image extraction is enabled)
config.imageMinSize.description: Minimum extracted image size in pixels used to skip tiny decorative images
config.enableDocumentSplitting.descripti: Automatically split large documents into multiple Markdown files for better performance and readability
config.documentSplittingThreshold.descri: Character count threshold for document splitting (documents exceeding this limit will be split into multiple files)
config.organizeInSubdirectory.descriptio: Organize converted Markdown files in a subdirectory to separate them from source files
config.markdownSubdirectoryName.descript: Name of the subdirectory where converted Markdown files will be stored
config.showSuccessNotifications.descript: Show popup notifications when files are successfully converted
config.createProjectConfig.description: When you explicitly enable DocuGenius for a workspace, persist project state in .docugenius.json (if disabled, project state stays in VS Code workspace storage and global settings are used)
config.copyTextFiles.description: Copy plain text files (.txt, .md, .csv, etc.) into the DocuGenius output location without modifying the originals
config.batchConversionBehavior.descripti: How to handle multiple files detected at once
config.batchConversionBehavior.askForEac: Ask for confirmation for each file individually
config.batchConversionBehavior.askOnce: Ask once for all files in the batch
config.batchConversionBehavior.convertAl: Automatically convert all files without asking
config.batchDetectionWindow.description: Time window (in milliseconds) to detect batch file operations
config.deleteGeneratedOutputsBehavior.de: When a source file is deleted, decide whether DocuGenius should also remove generated Markdown and related assets
command.convertFile.title: [DocuGenius]Convert to Markdown
command.convertFolder.title: [DocuGenius]Process All Files in Folder
command.enableProject.title: [DocuGenius]Enable for Current Project
command.disableProject.title: [DocuGenius]Disable for Current Project
command.showProjectStatus.title: [DocuGenius]Show Project Status
command.installRuntime.title: [DocuGenius]Install Shared Runtime
command.repairRuntime.title: [DocuGenius]Repair Shared Runtime
command.showRuntimeStatus.title: [DocuGenius]Show Runtime Status
command.showOutput.title: [DocuGenius]Show Output Log
tooltip.runtimeActionRequired:
Shared runtime needs attention. Click to open runtime status.
{0}
tooltip.runtimePythonMissing:
Python is required before the shared runtime can be prepared. Click to open runtime status.
{0}
converter.info.noProcessableFiles: No processable files found in the selected folder.
converter.warning.noContent: Could not extract content from {0}. The file may be image-based or use a format that is not supported yet. Try converting it to an editable format such as Word first.
converter.error.noContentExtracted: No content could be extracted from the document.
converter.error.builtinWindows:
Windows built-in Python converter failed to execute. This is usually caused by:

1. Python is not installed or not in PATH
2. Required Python packages could not be installed
3. File path or permission issues
converter.error.builtinEmbedded:
Embedded converter binary failed to execute. This might be due to:

1. Missing system libraries
2. Architecture mismatch
3. Permission issues
converter.error.builtinUnavailable: Built-in converter is not available. Please check the extension installation.
converter.error.macosArchitectureMismatc: Bundled macOS converter {2} does not support this machine architecture ({0}). Supported architectures: {1}.
converter.error.macosBinaryInspectionFai: Failed to inspect bundled macOS converter {0}: {1}
converter.error.macosPythonFallbackUnava: DocuGenius also could not find a usable system Python 3.6+ fallback on this Mac.
converter.log.cleanupFailed: Failed to clean up deleted file {0}: {1}
converter.tooltip.cleanup: Deleted generated Markdown and assets for {0}
fileWatcher.prompt.batchDetailSingle: Convert {0} document in this batch to Markdown?
fileWatcher.prompt.batchDetailPlural: Convert {0} documents in this batch to Markdown?
fileWatcher.info.autoConvertDisabled: Auto-convert has been disabled for this workspace. You can re-enable it in settings anytime.
fileWatcher.prompt.deleteGeneratedDetail:
DocuGenius found {0} generated file(s) and {1} generated folder(s) for this source file. Delete them too?

"Always Delete" remembers this choice for the current workspace.
fileWatcher.info.deleteGeneratedAlways: DocuGenius will now delete generated outputs automatically in this workspace.
fileWatcher.info.keepGeneratedAlways: DocuGenius will now keep generated outputs automatically in this workspace.
project.error.enableFailed: Failed to enable DocuGenius for this project
project.error.disableFailed: Failed to disable DocuGenius for this project
project.prompt.convertDetected: DocuGenius is enabled. Convertible documents were found in this project. Convert them now?
project.prompt.enableDetail:
After enabling, you can convert documents manually or turn on auto-convert in settings.

Converted files will be stored in the "DocuGenius" folder.
project.info.enabledReady: DocuGenius is enabled for this project. You can right-click files to convert them or turn on auto-convert in settings.
project.info.conversionStarted: Document conversion has started. Output will be saved to the "DocuGenius" folder.
project.info.disabled: DocuGenius has been disabled for this project
split.index.title: {0} - Document Index
split.index.description: This document has been split into {0} parts for better readability and performance.
split.index.generated: This index was automatically generated by DocuGenius.
log.batchComplete: Batch conversion complete: {0} files converted successfully
log.runtime.bootstrap: Preparing shared runtime with bootstrap Python: {0}
runtime.prompt.manualTitle: DocuGenius needs a shared local runtime before it can convert documents on Windows.
runtime.prompt.backgroundTitle: DocuGenius found documents to convert, but the shared runtime is not ready yet.
runtime.progress.creatingEnvironment: Creating an isolated shared Python environment...
runtime.progress.installingDependencies: Installing required conversion packages into the shared runtime...
runtime.error.installFailed: DocuGenius could not prepare the shared runtime. Open the logs to see the full setup output.
runtime.error.pythonMissing: DocuGenius could not find Python 3.6+ on this machine. Install Python once to bootstrap the shared runtime.
runtime.error.setupDeferred: DocuGenius skipped conversion because the shared runtime is not ready yet.
runtime.error.verifyFailed: The shared runtime was created, but dependency verification failed.
runtime.error.invalidRuntimePath: Refusing to modify a runtime path outside the extension storage directory.
runtime.error.timeout: Command timed out after {0} seconds while preparing the shared runtime.
runtime.detail.ready: The shared runtime is installed and verified.
runtime.detail.installRequired: The shared runtime has not been installed yet. DocuGenius will create one copy for this extension and reuse it across workspaces.
runtime.detail.repairRequired: The shared runtime exists, but it is missing files or dependencies and needs repair.
runtime.detail.missingPython: Python is required once to bootstrap the shared runtime. DocuGenius will not install dependencies into each workspace.
runtime.status.notManagedPlatform: This platform uses the built-in bundled converter and does not need a managed Python runtime.
